content:
🚀 dashy | Vue
🎯 Primary Use Case: To serve as a centralized, customizable, and self-hosted dashboard for managing and accessing personal services, applications, and links.
✨ Key Features: • Multiple pages support • Real-time status monitoring • Customizable widgets • Instant search and shortcuts • Multiple color themes and UI editor
📖 Summary: Dashy is a self-hostable personal dashboard designed to organize and provide quick access to all your self-hosted services and applications. It offers features like status monitoring, customizable widgets, theming, and a user-friendly UI editor, making it an ideal central hub for managing your homelab or personal projects.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
